elements.original_description: A cartoon brain with a light pink color, floating in the center of a pure white background. The brain has a friendly expression with small eyes and a smile. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a cartoon brain. The brain is light pink in color and is floating in the exact center of a pure white background. The brain has a friendly and cheerful expression, featuring simple, small eyes and a warm smile. Style is clean, high-contrast flat vector art with no shading, gradients, or textures. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The overall mood is simple and approachable.

elements.original_description: A stack of cartoon money bills in green, placed neatly in the center of a pure white background. The bills have a simple design with no detailed markings. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a stack of cartoon money bills. The stack is neat and orderly, placed perfectly in the center of a pure white background. The bills are a solid, simple green color with a very basic cartoon design and no intricate markings, serial numbers, or faces. Style is clean, high-contrast flat vector art with no shading, gradients, or textures. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The lighting and mood are neutral and clean.
